bench_setup.notes: DMA2 Stream5 CH7 drives DAC1 (PA4) with 4-level stepped waveform (0%/33%/66%/100%). TIM6 TRGO at 1kHz triggers DAC updates. ADC1 CH4 (same PA4 pin) samples each level, verifies within ±10%. PASS: detail0=last ADC reading (~4095). No external wiring needed.

peripheral_signals.notes: PA4 = DAC1_OUT = ADC1_IN4. Analog mode. No external wire needed.
